trajectory-line.$description: Capital trajectory line on the cycle-by-cycle projection chart.

target-line.$description: Dashed reference line for the goal capital (e.g. 100억).

milestone-repay.$description: Marker dot on the cycle where loan repayment from profit-share begins.

milestone-dividend.$description: Marker dot on the cycle where dividend reinvestment begins.

milestone-target.$description: Marker dot on the cycle where the goal is reached.

milestone-loan-matured.$description: Marker dot on the cycle where a term loan reaches maturity (balloon trigger).

balance-line.$description: Loan balance line on the projection chart — secondary to the capital line.

interest-accent.$description: Accent for accrued/cumulative interest figures in summary cards.

type-overdraft-bg.$description: 마이너스 통장 chip background — neutral / always-revolving connotation.

type-term-bg.$description: 일반 대출 chip background — emphasised as the choice with a fixed maturity.

pool-line.$description: Cumulative dividend principal line on the projection chart.

income-accent.$description: Accent for projected annual dividend income figures.

positive.$description: Net worth (capital − loan) when positive — primary hero figure.

negative.$description: Net worth hero figure when negative (deeply leveraged underwater state).

progress-track.$description: Progress-bar track for goal completion (회차 진행도).

buy-tone.$description: Buy-trade row accent (entry into a position).

pnl-positive-bg.$description: Realised-profit pill background; consumer should mix with 12% alpha.

pnl-negative-bg.$description: Realised-loss pill background; consumer should mix with 12% alpha.

note-rule.$description: Left-border rule on a trade note quoting the rationale (왜 샀/팔았는지).
